title: Baha Racing Chassis
logline: Off-road racing chassis designed and fabricated for Baja SAE competition.
description:
## The Challenge

Designing a lightweight, durable chassis for off-road racing competition. Balancing structural integrity with weight reduction across every joint and member.

## Process

Started with FEA simulations, moved to physical prototyping with steel tube bending. Iterated through three frame designs before arriving at the final competition build.

## Outcome

Completed chassis passed all technical inspections and survived a full weekend of endurance racing.

title: 48hr Game Jam
logline: A narrative puzzle game built in 48 hours with a team of four.
description:
## Concept

A puzzle game where the interface itself is the puzzle. Players manipulate UI elements — dragging menus, resizing windows, reordering tabs — to progress through a surreal narrative.

## Role

Lead designer and front-end developer. Built the interaction system and visual identity in 48 hours.

## Result

Won "Most Creative Mechanic" award at the Northwestern Game Jam.

title: Copenhagen Design Semester
logline: A semester of design work abroad — branding, wayfinding, and cultural identity.
description:
## Overview

A semester studying Scandinavian design principles in Copenhagen. Projects ranged from museum wayfinding systems to brand identity for local businesses.

## Key Takeaway

Constraint breeds creativity. Danish design's obsession with simplicity forced me to communicate more with less.

title: kookytiger Brand System
logline: Personal brand identity — from character design to full visual system.
description:
## The Character

kookytiger started as a doodle and became a full brand identity. Designing a character that feels both minimal and expressive — odd but cute.

## System

Color palette, typography, illustration guidelines, and motion principles that extend across digital and physical applications.

title: Liminal
logline: A 3-minute short film about the spaces between places.
description:
## Concept

A meditative short exploring transitional spaces — hallways, elevators, waiting rooms — and the strange intimacy of sharing them with strangers.

## Technique

Shot on 16mm film. No dialogue. Sound design carries the emotional weight.

title: Campus Accessibility Audit
logline: Comprehensive UX audit of Northwestern's digital accessibility.
description:
## Problem

Northwestern's internal tools had significant accessibility gaps affecting students with disabilities.

## Approach

Conducted 12 user interviews, ran WCAG audits on 8 key interfaces, and delivered a prioritized remediation roadmap.

## Impact

Three critical issues were fixed within the quarter based on findings.

title: Motion Design Reel
logline: Compilation of motion graphics and animation work from 2023-2025.
description:
## Overview

A curated reel of motion design work — title sequences, explainer animations, and experimental pieces.

## Tools

After Effects, Rive, CSS animations, and hand-drawn frame-by-frame sequences.

title: Component Design System
logline: A reusable component library built for rapid prototyping.
description:
## Motivation

Every hackathon started with rebuilding the same UI components. This library solves that — consistent, accessible components ready to ship.

## Architecture

Vanilla web components with CSS custom properties for theming. Zero dependencies.

title: Typographic Poster Series
logline: Experimental typography posters exploring language and form.
description:
## Concept

Each poster takes a single word and makes its visual form embody its meaning. Typography as illustration.

## Constraint

Black and white only. One typeface per poster. The word must be readable.

title: Beat Tape Vol. 1
logline: A collection of original hip-hop instrumentals.
description:
## The Side Hustle

Producing beats as a creative outlet. Lo-fi, sample-heavy, influenced by J Dilla and Nujabes.

## Listen

Placeholder for embedded player.

title: Dream Journal App
logline: An app for recording and visualizing dream patterns.
description:
## Concept

A dream journal that visualizes recurring themes, symbols, and emotions over time. Part diary, part data visualization.

## Status

Prototype stage — core recording flow and basic visualization working.
